title: Prevail
description: Exploring personal growth and overcoming adversity.
lyrics: I want to prevail right now, I want to dream right now I've spent too many nights, spent too many darkness Thinking about how I can't get the right way But there's no right way per se Just a tone inside your brain And the vibrations of the things you want And how far have you gone To make that a reality Cause you gotta work hard Connect with everything you come across Be the spark, be the ground, be the humming Come around and have everyone coming from the one That's how you get past the darkness, show the light and the one Prevail in your heart first Prevail with your star, it's like a starburst It explodes and then you know Yeah, no matter what the dark road has to hold ya Yeah, you're gonna prevail You're gonna fight the one that you wanted to heal from You're gonna prevail In your nightmare Alone we, not alone we fight Together, together, together Is that what they say when you come together And you have a family per se And who's the one to judge what that means to you It's just a word that we agree on man It sounds different in different languages It's like hello, hola, hi, goodbye, no way that I say that This is the reason why I'm telling you my life will be alright I just roll with the weather, know that what I do is good No matter which way I wanna wanna do it Cause I know my brain is the one that has the ultimate judge over me So I uplift myself with self love, I do Tell myself, feel it all, I really do And through that night baby, yeah, you'll see that Yeah, we will prevail Through all the dark nights No matter what we fight We will prevail And there's hell we climb up to By the start we're all heartless I know it gets lost In the shovel of the fight Do you fight, you fight yourself Lost in the shovel you hide I wish I could be better, I do, I do Oh man, I wish I could not be tied To one thought and one view and embrace it all But fortunately I know, beyond it we prevail We prevail through this hell Oh won't you come down with me Prevail in the hell to the dimes Prevail in the hell to the crimes Prevail in the hell to the people that made us fight each other For their wicked power designs We will prevail

lyricsSegments.text: I want to prevail right now, I want to dream right now
I've spent too many nights, spent too many darkness
Thinking about how I can't get the right way
But there's no right way per se
Just a tone inside your brain
And the vibrations of the things you want
And how far have you gone
To make that a reality
Cause you gotta work hard
Connect with everything you come across
Be the spark, be the ground, be the humming
Come around and have everyone coming from the one
That's how you get past the darkness, show the light and the one
Prevail in your heart first
Prevail with your star, it's like a starburst
It explodes and then you know
Yeah, no matter what the dark road has to hold ya
Yeah, you're gonna prevail
You're gonna fight the one that you wanted to heal from
You're gonna prevail
In your nightmare
Alone we, not alone we fight
Together, together, together
Is that what they say when you come together
And you have a family per se
And who's the one to judge what that means to you
It's just a word that we agree on man
It sounds different in different languages
It's like hello, hola, hi, goodbye, no way that I say that
This is the reason why
I'm telling you my life will be alright
I just roll with the weather, know that what I do is good
No matter which way I wanna wanna do it
Cause I know my brain is the one that has the ultimate judge over me
So I uplift myself with self love, I do
Tell myself, feel it all, I really do
And through that night baby, yeah, you'll see that
Yeah, we will prevail
Through all the dark nights
No matter what we fight
We will prevail
And there's hell we climb up to
By the start we're all heartless
I know it gets lost
In the shovel of the fight
Do you fight, you fight yourself
Lost in the shovel you hide
I wish I could be better, I do, I do
Oh man, I wish I could not be tied
To one thought and one view and embrace it all
But fortunately I know, beyond it we prevail
We prevail through this hell
Oh won't you come down with me
Prevail in the hell to the dimes
Prevail in the hell to the crimes
Prevail in the hell to the people that made us fight each other
For their wicked power designs
We will prevail
